ddls:
CREATE TABLE "concerts" (
  "concert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concert */,
  "concert_date" TEXT /* Date of the concert */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the concert */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the concert */,
  "concert_title" TEXT /* Title of the concert including artist lineup */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the concert is held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the concert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the concert (e.g., Scheduled, Cancelled, Postponed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the concert */,
  "ticket_sales_start" TEXT /* Date and time when ticket sales begin */,
  "ticket_sales_end" TEXT /* Date and time when ticket sales end */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organizer of the concert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concerts_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concerts_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the venue */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "concert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concert for which the ticket is sold */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of the ticket (e.g., General Admission, VIP) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Number of tickets available for this type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., Available, Sold, Reserved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket type was last updated */,
  "sales_statistics" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store sales statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_concert_id FOREIGN KEY ("concert_id") REFERENCES concerts ("concert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed and salted) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store user's notification preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist's music */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the artist */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concert_artists" (
  "concert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concert */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "performance_order" INTEGER /* Order of performance for the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concert_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the organizer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "concert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concert */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of tickets in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_concert_id FOREIGN KEY ("concert_id") REFERENCES concerts ("concert_id")
)
